ValidationRule.description: The earliest anticipated start date is required at the negotiation stage of the Opportunity.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Negotiating"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Signed")), ISBLANK( Earliest_Anticipated_Start_Date__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To enter the Negotiating stage, an Earliest Anticipated Start Date is required.
